description: The Stag-class is a recently manufactured vessel by hardline dating 500fsc, made to exploit the abundance of salvageable sites and wreckages across frontier space. Due to the unstable and uncharted nature of the frontier, Stag-class vessels are equipped with turbine generators to supply sufficient power and thrust for long distance ventures, and moderate crew accommodation to keep its members in healthy working condition. Typically equipped with large amounts of hauling and disassembly equipment, It's larger cargo storage rarely finds trouble keeping all found goods secured.
